headline: Does DTE’s Data Center Ambitions Amid Grid Upgrades Reshape the Bull Case for DTE Energy (DTE)?
summary: DTE Energy recently highlighted advanced outage operations technology, including real-time monitoring, smart grid devices, and drones, while facing growing public and legislative scrutiny in Michigan over its role in large-scale data center projects and political activities. This combination of grid modernization and controversial data center-driven expansion puts DTE at the center of debates over reliability, decarbonization, and how monopoly utilities influence energy policy. Now we’ll...
